reviews.author: David Hildenbrand (Arm)
reviews.summary: Suggested renaming the function to better reflect its purpose and proposed two alternative names. Expressed approval of the patch with a 'LGTM' comment, but noted that their understanding of memcg lifetimes is limited.

2026-03-12.patch_summary: This patch introduces a new helper function, memcg_list_lru_alloc_folio(), which allocates list_lru heads for a given folio under memory cgroup (memcg) control. The function is designed to be lightweight and efficient, allowing it to operate under RCU protection without pinning the memcg. This change is part of a larger effort to switch the THP shrinker to use list_lru.
